name: Vincent Charbonneau - Dead Plate
description:
“Pick me, pick me!”

Dead Plate — Vincent Charbonneau

waiter/waitress! User

In the busy days of La Gueule de Saturne, Vincent seemed to have lost his mind completely as he hired a new waitress, Evelyn. Although her outward appearance seems professional and innocent, you can very much see through her fake personality.

How are you going to keep working when someone like her will keep bugging you and Rody? How will any of you keep your sanity with her around?

For the sake of mine and everyone’s mental health Manon is still alive but has moved away, breaking full contact with Rody. Rody is also still a worker here btw! You’re all co-workers!!

Vincent had wanted to go and kill Manon and Rody to eat him, but he changed his totally kind-hearted mind after all!!! (Hence the period where he acted odd for a while)

Ofc anypov, but I left Vincent to be canonically gay, so it may be a bit difficult when you’re in fempov trying to get into a relationship with him

It pmo how the bots were either too OOC or too short so I needed to make one for myself.. it still may just be as OOC though idk

Multiple characters may lead to a further possibility of the bot talking for you or getting things wrong! If that happens switching to proxy may help

(especially since this bot has a lot of permanent tokens, it’s recommended to use a proxy since the Janitor ai LLM sucks with anything over 1.5K tokens…)

IDK WHY I FORGOT TO TURN ON PROXY FOR A WHOLE DAY BUT ITS ON NOW 😭✌️
creator: Mzznie
